mapper.select: SELECT r.id as roomId, r.name, r.description, u.username as ownerName, COALESCE(member_count.count, 0) as currentMembers, r.havePwd FROM room r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.owner_id = u.Id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, COUNT(*) as count FROM room_member GROUP BY room_id ) member_count ON r.id = member_count.room_id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM room_member WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_member (room_id, user_id, role) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userId}, #{role})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM room_member WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.* FROM room r INNER JOIN room_member rm ON r.id = rm.room_id WHERE rm.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id as roomId, r.name, r.description, u.username as ownerName, COALESCE(member_count.count, 0) as currentMembers, r.havePwd FROM room r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.owner_id = u.Id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, COUNT(*) as count FROM room_member GROUP BY room_id ) member_count ON r.id = member_count.room_id WHERE r.owner_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT CASE WHEN role = 2 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM room_member WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
